# ggsegArslan

This package contains dataset for plotting the Arslan atlas with ggseg.

Arslan S & Rueckert D (2015). Multi-level parcellation of the cerebral
cortex using resting-state fMRI. In *International Conference on Medical
Image Computing and Computer-Assisted Intervention* (pp. 47-54).
Springer, Cham.

## Installation

We recommend installing the ggseg-atlases through the ggseg
[r-universe](https://ggseg.r-universe.dev/ui#builds):

``` r
options(repos = c(
  ggseg = "https://ggseg.r-universe.dev",
  CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"
))

install.packages("ggsegArslan")
```

You can install this package from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("ggsegverse/ggsegArslan")
```

## Arslan atlas

``` r
library(ggseg)
library(ggsegArslan)

plot(arslan())
```

![](reference/figures/README-arslan-1.png)

## Data source

Arslan S & Rueckert D (2015). Multi-level parcellation of the cerebral
cortex using resting-state fMRI. In *International Conference on Medical
Image Computing and Computer-Assisted Intervention* (pp. 47-54).
Springer, Cham.

# Package index

## Atlases

Brain atlases bundled in this package

- [`arslan()`](https://ggseg.github.io/ggsegArslan/reference/arslan.md)
  : Arslan Multi-Level Parcellation Atlas
